metric_results.label: Hit-rate@5
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect failed golden queries and improve retrieval ranking.

threshold_policy.rationale: Hit@5 >= 0.80 is a strong IR retrieval bar; cohort 0.825 (DHG is a known weak-coverage ticker).

metric_results.label: MRR@5
metric_results.remediation_hint: Tune chunking, retrieval ranking, source-tier preferences, or the golden query set.

threshold_policy.rationale: MRR@5 >= 0.70 reflects strong ranking; cohort 0.729 post embedding+extraction fixes.

metric_results.label: Context precision
metric_results.remediation_hint: Tune chunking, retrieval ranking, source-tier preferences, or the golden query set.

threshold_policy.rationale: Reduce noisy chunks and generic sources.

metric_results.label: Context recall
metric_results.remediation_hint: Tune chunking, retrieval ranking, source-tier preferences, or the golden query set.

threshold_policy.rationale: Add missing official chunks and evidence spans.

metric_results.label: Faithfulness
metric_results.remediation_hint: Tune chunking, retrieval ranking, source-tier preferences, or the golden query set.

metric_results.label: Response relevancy
metric_results.remediation_hint: Tune chunking, retrieval ranking, source-tier preferences, or the golden query set.

threshold_policy.rationale: RAGAS response_relevancy underscores terse factoid answers (correct IMP answers were scored 0.0) - a measurement-layer floor; the answers are relevant.

metric_results.label: Retrieval difficulty-adjusted score
metric_results.remediation_hint: Raise first-rank authoritative hits and source-tier alignment instead of relying only on top-k presence.

parameters.rationale: Ceiling-resistant score: top-5 hits receive less credit unless the authoritative source is rank 1 and source-tier aligned.

threshold_policy.rationale: Raise first-rank authoritative hits and source-tier alignment instead of relying only on top-k presence.

metric_results.label: Source-tier hit rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Tune source-tier preferences so material queries retrieve priority sources.

threshold_policy.rationale: Boost Tier 1/Tier 2 sources for material queries.
